arts.ttl: Evan Ferguson to Arsenal? The state of play revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with a potential move for Brighton striker Evan Ferguson as the January transfer window approaches, with the Gunners having searched for a centre-forward since the summer. Brighton are thought to be ready to allow Republic of Ireland international Ferguson to depart on a loan deal in January, with the 20-year-old forward having struggled to gain the favour of head coach Fabian Hurzeler following injury issues.

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Another Man City defeat, Man Utd to be thrashed
arts.sum: Our football betting expert Jones Knows is back to provide more Premier League insight ahead of a busy midweek card.

arts.ttl: It was my dream to play for Arsenal
arts.sum: Prior to his move to Liverpool, Babel, who had scored eight goals and laid on eight assists in the previous season for Ajax, was linked with Arsenal . Speaking to Instant Casino, Babel said: "The rumours were there, the news articles were there, but Arsenal never officially reached out.

arts.ttl: Manchester United include exciting 16-year old-talent in Premier League squad for first time
arts.sum: Man Utd are set to play Arsenal in the Premier League on Wednesday night and a 16-year-old will be in the squad.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set for triple boost by defeating Ruben Amorim and Man Utd
arts.sum: Hitting this early encouragement at Manchester United after back-to-back wins would be an enjoyable and yet beneficial reward for the Gunners. Whatever the scoreline, Arsenal need to keep their winning formula alive as it feels like the next slip-up could be terminal for their title hopes.

arts.ttl: 'The real acid test': Chris Sutton predicts the final score between Arsenal and Manchester United tonight
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are preparing for a huge Premier League fixture at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday night. For years, Arsenal v Manchester United was by far the...

arts.ttl: The Arsenal model Manchester United must follow under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta endured two tough years while imprinting his ideology onto Arsenal and turning the club into title contenders – now the question is if Amorim can have the same impact at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted XI as Luke Shaw issue forces Ruben Amorim reshuffle at Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United will head to Arsenal without a host of their big names, Lisandro Martinez among them, whilst Luke Shaw is a late withdrawal due to a fresh injury setback

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Son Heung-Min is a 'Viable Target' for Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United see Tottenham Hotspur superstar Son Heung-min as a 'viable target' with the South Korean's contract set to run out next summer.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: NIGHTMARE Kvaratskhelia blow
arts.sum: It was revealed last month that Man Utd were ready to launch a bid for Kvaratskhelia, with the Red Devils poised to offer the Georgia winger a wage of €9 million in a ploy to get him to refuse any new contract offer from Napoli. Despite Kvaratskhelia preferring to play on the right than the left, Liverpool see him as a potential replacement for Mohamed Salah should the Egypt international depart in the summer, which looks increasingly likely after he claimed that no new contract offer has been forthcoming from the Reds.
